zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Wotton於1460年出生在英國肯特布頓 馬爾海貝時，他的父親Sir Nicholas Wotton30歲，母親Elizabeth De Bamburgh35歲。他和Lady Anne Belknap至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他於1498年在英國肯特被列為high sheriff。他去世於1524年在法國阿奎泰道多卡拉斯享年64歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Wotton于1460年出生在英国肯特布頓 馬爾海貝时，他的父亲Sir Nicholas Wotton30岁，母亲Elizabeth De Bamburgh35岁。他和Lady Anne Belknap至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他于1498年在英国肯特被列为high sheriff。他去世于1524年在法国阿奎泰道多卡拉斯享年64岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Wotton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wooten
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called with Old English wid(u), wudu ‘wood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, such as Wootton in Northamptonshire or Oxfordshire, Wootton Bassett in Wiltshire, Wotton in Surrey, and Wotton under Edge in Gloucestershire.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Wotton was born in 1460, in Boughton Malherbe, Kent, England, his father, Sir Nicholas Wotton, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth De Bamburgh, was 35. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Lady Anne Belknap. In 1498, at the age of 38, his occupation is listed as high sheriff in Kent, England. He died in 1524, in Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France, at the age of 64, and was buried in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Wotton est né en 1460, à Boughton Malherbe, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas Wotton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth De Bamburgh, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Lady Anne Belknap. En 1498, à l’âge de 38 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff à Kent, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1524, à Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Wotton 1460 in Boughton Malherbe, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Nicholas Wotton 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth De Bamburgh 35. Er hatte mit Lady Anne Belknap mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1498, als er 38 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff in Kent, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1524 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Frankreich und wurde in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Wotton è nato il nel 1460 nel Boughton Malherbe, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir Nicholas Wotton, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth De Bamburgh, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Lady Anne Belknap. Nel 1498, all'età di 38 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff nel Kent, England. Morì nel 1524, nel Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Wottonが1460年にイギリスケントボウトン マルハーベで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Wottonは30歳，母Elizabeth De Bamburghは35歳であった。彼はLady Anne Belknapとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。1498年，38歳の時，イギリスケントでの職業はhigh sheriffと記録されている。彼は1524年にフランスアクイティアインドールドグンカレイスで64歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Wotton(이)가 1460년 영국 켄트 부그h턴 말헤르브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Wotton(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth De Bamburgh(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Lady Anne Belknap(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1498년, 38세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 켄트에서 high sheriff이었다. 그는 1524년 프랑스 아키테인 도르도그니 캘레이에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Wotton nasceu em 1460, em Boughton Malherbe, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Wotton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth De Bamburgh, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Lady Anne Belknap. Em 1498, com 38 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff em Kent, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1524, em Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, França, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Wotton родился в 1460 г. в местности боугтон малхирб, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Wotton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth De Bamburgh, 35. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Lady Anne Belknap. В 1498 году, в возрасте 38 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff в местности кэнт, Англия. Он умер в 1524 г. в местности калеи, дордогн, аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности калеи, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Wotton nació en 1460, en Boughton Malherbe, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Nicholas Wotton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth De Bamburgh, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Lady Anne Belknap. En 1498, a la edad de 38 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff en Kent, Inglaterra. Murió en 1524, en Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
